feedback.name: Vignesh R
feedback.review: Teaching is so good and superb understandable. He has incredibly knowledgeable and patient. He has a great way of breaking down complex backend concepts and making them easy to understand. Through this course, I gained hands-on experience with Java, Spring Boot, and frontend technologies. I now feel much more confident in my coding abilities. Highly recommended for anyone looking to start their career in tech!.

feedback.name: Dixon A
feedback.review: Explain Concepts Clearly with real-time example, making it easy to understand even complex topics. Hands-on practice sessions and project helped me improve my coding skills and confidence.
